Class ExpenseController.ExpenseResult

java.lang.Object
Controllers.ExpenseController.ExpenseResult
Enclosing class:
ExpenseController
public static class ExpenseController.ExpenseResult extends Object
Represents the outcome of processing an expense.

Carries a success flag, a user-facing message, an optional warning, and a rejection type string used to differentiate error cases in the UI.

  • Field Details

    • success

      private final boolean success

    • message

      private final String message

    • warning

      private final String warning

    • rejectionType

      private final String rejectionType

  • Constructor Details

    • ExpenseResult

      public ExpenseResult(boolean success, String message, String rejectionType)
      Constructs an ExpenseResult without a warning message.
      Parameters:
      success - true if the expense was processed successfully
      message - a user-facing message describing the outcome
      rejectionType - a code identifying the rejection reason, or null on success

    • ExpenseResult

      public ExpenseResult(boolean success, String message, String warning, String rejectionType)
      Constructs an ExpenseResult with an optional warning message.
      Parameters:
      success - true if the expense was processed successfully
      message - a user-facing message describing the outcome
      warning - an optional warning message shown alongside success
      rejectionType - a code identifying the rejection reason, or null on success

  • Method Details

    • isSuccess

      public boolean isSuccess()
      Returns whether the expense was successfully processed.
      Returns:
      true if successful

    • getMessage

      public String getMessage()
      Returns the primary user-facing message for this result.
      Returns:
      the result message

    • getWarning

      public String getWarning()
      Returns an optional warning message associated with this result.
      Returns:
      the warning string, or null if none

    • getRejectionType

      public String getRejectionType()
      Returns the rejection type code for this result.
      Returns:
      the rejection type string, or null if the expense succeeded

    • hasWarning

      public boolean hasWarning()
      Returns whether this result carries a non-empty warning message.
      Returns:
      true if a warning is present
